name: Monte Carlo Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package of greens (escarole, leaf lettuce, radiccio, and curly endive) - 10 oz.
1 package of Italian dry salami slices - 3 oz., quartered
1 jar of marinated artichoke hearts - 6.5 oz., drained, halved
1 can of sliced black olives - 2 1/4 oz., drained
1/4 cup (up to 1/3 cup) of Italian herb vinaigrette salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, gently toss together the salad greens, salami, artichokes, olives, and almost all of the feta.
2. Gently toss with the salad dressing.
3. Garnish with remaining feta.
